data.title: RED: Tests for brainstorm gate hook and pre-enterplanmode dispatcher
data.description:
## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `bash tests/run-all.sh` passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] Test file exists at tests/hooks/test-brainstorm-gate-hook.sh
  Verify: test -f tests/hooks/test-brainstorm-gate-hook.sh
- [ ] Test file contains at least 4 test functions
  Verify: grep -c "test_" tests/hooks/test-brainstorm-gate-hook.sh | awk '{exit ($1 < 4)}'
- [ ] Test asserts hook blocks (exit 2) when no sentinel file exists
  Verify: grep -q "sentinel.*absent\|no.*sentinel\|without.*sentinel" tests/hooks/test-brainstorm-gate-hook.sh
- [ ] Test asserts hook allows (exit 0) when sentinel file exists for the session
  Verify: grep -q "sentinel.*present\|sentinel.*exists\|with.*sentinel" tests/hooks/test-brainstorm-gate-hook.sh
- [ ] Test asserts config brainstorm.enforce_entry_gate=false disables the gate
  Verify: grep -q "enforce_entry_gate\|disable.*gate\|config.*false" tests/hooks/test-brainstorm-gate-hook.sh
- [ ] Test pipes JSON to pre-enterplanmode.sh dispatcher and asserts exit code (functional dispatcher test)
  Verify: grep -q "pre-enterplanmode\|dispatcher" tests/hooks/test-brainstorm-gate-hook.sh
- [ ] All new tests FAIL (RED) against current code (no hook exists yet)
  Verify: bash tests/hooks/test-brainstorm-gate-hook.sh 2>&1 | grep -q "FAIL\|failed"
- [ ] .test-index entry maps source files to test file
  Verify: grep -q "test-brainstorm-gate-hook" .test-index

## TDD Requirement
Write behavioral tests following the pattern in tests/hooks/test-plan-review-gate.sh. Tests create temp dirs, write/omit sentinel files with session-scoped names (brainstorm-sentinel-<session_id>), source session-misc-functions.sh to call hook_brainstorm_gate, and pipe JSON to pre-enterplanmode.sh. Tests must FAIL (RED) since the hook function and dispatcher don't exist yet.

## File Impact
- tests/hooks/test-brainstorm-gate-hook.sh (create)
- .test-index (modify — add mapping)
